name: Denver Golf Performance
address: 600 S Holly St Unit 104, Denver, CO 80222
about: Denver Golf Performance is a golf training studio focused on improving performance through technology, fitness, and coaching. They utilize advanced tools like Trackman, KVest 3D, BodiTrak, and V1 Video to provide precise swing analysis and game planning. The facility emphasizes individualized programs that cater to each golfer's unique physical needs and skill level, offering services ranging from lessons and fitness sessions to recovery treatments and simulator practice.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA Tour-level Trackman technology for precise data and practice
Integrated golf fitness and recovery programs to optimize performance
Individualized coaching and training plans tailored to personal goals

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar system used by PGA Tour for practice and simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs for lessons and simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention food or drink service, so it appears to be BYOB (bring your own) with no restrictions noted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes can be played in the Trackman simulator, though exact time isn't specified; typical simulator rounds take 2-3 hours depending on pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific mention of junior programs or kid-friendly amenities, but they do work with youth athletes in their fitness coaching.
